title: Best Practices for Unit Testing Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on unit testing best practices.

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of testing only one 'unit'—like a single function—at a time?
options: It makes the test faster and easier to debug if it fails
It makes your code build faster
It deletes old commits by mistake

questions.question: Regarding unit testing, how should you handle external systems like databases and web services?
options: Always test against the actual system
Don't test them; only test your internal code
Use mocks or stubs to control their behavior and isolate your tests
Delete the tests if they depend on an external system

questions.question: Which of these is a key rule of writing descriptive test case names?
options: They should describe specifically what function or component is being tested and what the expected result is
They should be as short as possible
